---
title: "test_pennyone_evolution.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/crucible/test_pennyone_evolution.ts"
loc: 38
complexity: 1
logic_score: 6.57
style_score: 5.78
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 8.33
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 5.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [runScan](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/index.ts)
- [*](file://fs/promises)
- [*](file://path)
- [test](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [registry](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/pathRegistry.ts)
- [closeDb](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/intel/database.ts)
- [closeGravityDb](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/intel/gravity_db.ts)

### Exports
- `runEvolutionTest`
- `testDir`
- `filePath`
- `content`
- `scan1`
- `intent1`
- `startWarm`
- `scan2`
- `durationWarm`
- `scan3`
